(“whom God aids”), Eleazar, pr.n.m.-

(1) Exo 6:23, 25 28:1 Lev 10:6, seq.; Num 3:2, , 32 17:2 , Num 17:4 19:3 20:25 , seq.; 26:3 , seq.; 31:6 , seq.; 32:2 , 28 Num 32:28 34:17 Deu 10:6 Jos 14:1 1Ch 6:35.-(2) 2Sa 23:9 1Ch 11:12.-(3) 1Sa 7:1.-(4) 1Ch 23:21 24:28 .-(5) Ezr 8:33, compare Neh 12:42.-(6) Ezr 10:25. LXX. Ἐλεάζαρ. From Ἐλεάζαρος there was afterwards formed the contracted name Λάζαρος.
